title: Special monthly CRM feature update [shared email template] ⭐

posts.author: elkemoshel (Elke Moshel)
posts.cookedHtml:
For all you CRM users - you’ll be happy to know what we’ve just released the well anticipated shared email templates functionality under Emails&Activities.

What does this mean?

Your high-converting emails can now be saved as a template. Not only that - they can now be shared with your team/colleagues etc! This features increases productivity, saves you time by eliminating drafting email after email - allowing you to focus on what matters most - closing deals! How awesome is that!?

Please note, this awesome feature is only available for monday sales CRM product users.

For more info, please see here

We would love to know your thoughts

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re super excited about this - we have a lot of clients that have started using shared templates and have loved it!

Tanner
Monday.com Consultant
Elevate Business Operations
